steps: 1. Submit application form with skills and availability
3. Attend virtual orientation (every 1st Saturday of the month)
4. Sign the Volunteer Code of Conduct
5. Get assigned to a team by the coordinator
6. Complete first task within 2 weeks of onboarding
onboarding.orientation_schedule: Every 1st Saturday, 11:00 AM IST via Google Meet

coordinator.description: Manages a team of 5-10 field volunteers. POC for NGO leadership.

admin.description: Handles organizational and documentation tasks remotely.

recognition_policy.referral_bonus: Priority event access for every 2 active referrals

retention_triggers.action: Send re-engagement email and reassign lighter tasks

code_of_conduct: Respect all beneficiaries, fellow volunteers, and staff
Do not represent NayePankh officially without approval
